desc: After running away from her home as a young girl, a 40-year-old woman now returns, only to face the wrath of her family.

title: Astitva Ek Prem Kahani
desc: Dr Simran, a renowned gynaecologist, marries Abhi, who is 10 years younger to her. However, her family disapproves of the match.

title: Ishq Subhan Allah
desc: Kabir takes drastic measures by locking Sartaj away and assuming his place. However, the festive atmosphere is shattered for Salma when Zara confesses that she has not given her consent to the union.

title: Ishq Subhan Allah
desc: Kabir promises Zara that they will settle their differences together. However, their fragile peace is shattered when he confesses the truth regarding Rukhsar's pregnancy.

title: Ishq Subhan Allah
desc: Rukhsar employs threats to prevent Kabir from revealing a critical secret to Zara. Later, a conflicted Kabir seeks counsel from Peer Sahab as he grapples with his moral dilemma.

title: Ishq Subhan Allah
desc: Fate intertwines two devout Islam followers with clashing ideologies. Kabeer and Zara's encounter sparks a whirlwind of change, challenging their core beliefs.
